stocks.impact_theory: Hot CPI report raised inflation fears, pressuring rate-sensitive stocks, but NVDA resilient due to AI demand. Economic implications: higher rates hurt growth but AI capex intact. Market psychology: FOMO on AI leaders despite macro. Historical parallels: Tech held in 2022 rate hikes. Analogies: Oak in storm (resilient), diamond in rough (value shines).

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X posts show bullish flow, breakout talks, resilient gainer amid Dow slip. Web news: growth stock watch, AI demand strong despite inflation.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 5-10% gains on AI momentum, target $200.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short risky, potential 3% loss if breakout.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Broader tech selloff on rates, competition in AI chips.

stocks.justification: Strong X sentiment, consistent gainer status, AI secular trend.

stocks.impact_theory: Strait of Hormuz tensions keep oil ~$100+, boosting energy profits. Implications: higher energy costs feed inflation. Psychology: scarcity fear drives bids. Parallels: 2022 Ukraine oil spike. Analogies: Fuel to fire (amps economy/inflation), rising tide lifts oil boats.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Oil high on Hormuz, earnings preview positive EPS growth. X: options bets on conflict, FCF printing.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 4-8% on sustained oil, dividend yield.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short if peace talks succeed, 5% loss.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Ceasefire reopens strait, oil crash; recession cuts demand.

stocks.justification: Geopolitical clear, but talks risk resolution.

stocks.impact_theory: Hot CPI lifts yields, net interest margins expand. Implications: stronger bank earnings. Psychology: rates up = banks win. Parallels: 2018 rate hike cycle. Analogies: Tailwind sail, rising tide for lenders.
